testcase.name: [CapstoneProject3-GoRest-API-Suite] GoRest API - Users Endpoint › GoRest API - GET - users › GET - should return all users with status 200
[CapstoneProject3-GoRest-API-Suite] GoRest API - Users Endpoint › GoRest API - GET - users › GET - should return a single user by ID with status 200
